finding: the most-significant scalar joint-divisibility pattern has family-wise permutation p = 0.2270 vs 1000 random-integer corpora of matched magnitude — NOT beyond chance

frequency_preserving_sequence_demo.finding: under the frequency-preserving null, the sequence residue 'findings' are typical (p>0.05) — i.e. ARTIFACTS of natural (Zipfian) value distributions, not numerical design; the uniform-integer null mislabels them
